canonical_question: How do I build a SaaS financial model — MRR waterfall, cohort analysis, P&L, cash flow, cap table, scenario toggles?
aliases: How to build an MRR waterfall in Google Sheets
Three-statement SaaS model with cohort analysis
SaaS cap table and scenario analysis spreadsheet

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: SaaS valuation multiples compressed to 6-10x ARR median in 2025; CAC payback benchmarks shifted to 15 months median

constraints: MRR waterfall must separate five components: New, Expansion, Contraction, Churn, Reactivation
Cohort analysis requires minimum 6 months of data to produce meaningful retention curves
Three-statement model must be integrated — P&L net income flows to cash flow, ending cash flows to balance sheet
Scenario toggles must change only assumption cells, never formula cells
Cap table must model SAFEs and convertible notes pre-conversion

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs SaaS metrics definitions only, not a working model
User needs fundraising pitch deck financials, not a full operating model
User is post-Series B and needs enterprise FP&A tooling

inputs_needed.question: Which spreadsheet tool should be used?
What is the user's financial modeling skill level?
What stage is the SaaS company?
Is the user building this for fundraising?

related_to.label: Benchmark data to validate model assumptions
ARR growth rate benchmarks by stage
